purpose: Battle parity fixtures compare ordered source-shaped events without depending on presentation nodes.

field_definitions.sequence_index: Zero-based ordered event index in the fixture log.
field_definitions.phase: Source-shaped battle phase such as intro, action_select, move_select, turn_action, animation, healthbar, faint, post_battle.
field_definitions.event_type: Stable event kind: prompt, input, message, stat_change, damage, heal, animation, wait, audio_metadata, state_mutation, unsupported.
field_definitions.source_symbol: Source C function, ASM label, table symbol, or generated symbol responsible for the event.
field_definitions.battler: Active battler id/symbol or empty when the event is side/global.
field_definitions.side: player, opponent, partner, enemy, field, or none.
field_definitions.action: Selected action or move/item/switch/run command metadata.
field_definitions.message_id: Battle string id or text symbol, not a final localized text assertion by itself.
field_definitions.animation_id: Move/general/status/special animation symbol or transition id.
field_definitions.hp_delta: Signed HP change applied by the event.
field_definitions.pp_delta: Signed PP change applied by the event.
field_definitions.wait_frames: Source-intended wait duration when known; null when not yet traced.
field_definitions.rng_rolls: Ordered RNG calls consumed by the event with source purpose labels.
field_definitions.unsupported: Array of unsupported/deviation records that remain visible in parity logs.
